region-europe.title: European Research Field
region-europe.lens: Comparable language • Radical collaboration • Communication mechanisms
region-europe.intro: A source-led atlas of European Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-europe.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of European Research Field.
deepDive: The second feature is institutionalized radical collaboration. Living with Machines, among others, Alan Turing Industries, placed historians, data scientists, geographers, computing linguists and librarians in the same stream of work, despite the 2023 binding of its team signature, data description and collection calculation methods, still affect the digital humanities of Europe. The third feature is the “circulation” of literature to replace static country containers: Berlin Temporal Communications, with the literary creation time community at its core, showed that the agenda was still operational but not evidence of the intensity of funding, as evidenced by its 2026 self-financing visit; the “theory flow” project looked at translation, exile, doormen and global/localization, and Palread understood Palestinian literature as transnational practice beyond nation-States with maps, time lines, archives and sound materials.

ELTeC's value is not just the number of texts, but the visualization of the sample dimensions of the age of publication, sex, length, re-editing/modely; this enables researchers to examine how the sample of “story of a language fiction” was formed. CLS INFRA goes further by incorporating versions, licences, data files, tools and skills training. The logical cross-language research process should therefore be: the language teams define unattainable places before creating minimal public metadata; the model is validated in the language before cross-language comparisons are made; and finally, countries return to publishing historical interpretations. Translation of all text machines into English into a reclassification that, while convenient, removes phrases, rhymes and text symbols should not be a default scheme.

Living with Machines shows that the knowledge of the librarians of OCR, the layout, copyright and the library gaps are as critical as the algorithm selection; and historians are not just providing for data science. (Living with Machines Project, 2023) Team results should be written by a contributing role (speech, code, field interpretation, project management, public participation) rather than by mere paper writing. The direct inspiration for literary research is that the work of maintenance of materials, calibration, translation and metadata must be visible, otherwise “sizing innovation” is based on invisible work.
coreIdeas: Standardistic paradox: No criteria can be compared, but the uniform classification would treat a country ' s history or colonial language relations as universal. The solution is not to abandon the comparison, but to make public the “uncomparable log” and language errors.

Inequality in project-based systems: EU/UK large-scale funding generates high-quality infrastructure and may also place data collation on less resourced language teams, and the theoretical visibility of central agency harvesting. The signature of contributions and the flow of funds should be indicators of assessment.

Neural reduction risk: brain/behaviour indicators can test some mechanisms and cannot be a substitute for aesthetic history and interpretation debate. “Natural reading” of the experiment must also describe equipment, language skills and educational background. (Jacobs, 2015; Kukkonen, 2019)

AI Author Responsibility: Distributive authors are not “unaccountable”. A distinction should be made between the chain of responsibility for data copyright, model design, alert control, editorial selection and publication fraud. (Bajohr, 2024)
method: The primary feature of the European front is not a single theoretical centre, but a transnational infrastructure that brings together literary history, linguistic standards, translation and research training organizations. CLS INFRA views data, tools, methods, skills and access mechanisms as the same research ecology, with a result page that not only lists data sets and software but also documents such methodological documents as skills gaps, replicability and “programmable language”.

The second feature is institutionalized radical collaboration. Living with Machines, among others, Alan Turing Industries, placed historians, data scientists, geographers, computing linguists and librarians in the same stream of work, despite the 2023 binding of its team signature, data description and collection calculation methods, still affect the digital humanities of Europe.
From "Building a Language Library" to programmable, versionable, comparable infrastructure

ELTeC's value is not just the number of texts, but the visualization of the sample dimensions of the age of publication, sex, length, re-editing/modely; this enables researchers to examine how the sample of “story of a language fiction” was formed. CLS INFRA goes further by incorporating versions, licences, data files, tools and skills training.
cases: Case A: ELTEC-CLS INFRA - “Comparability” is a consultation, not a natural attribute of data
Case B: Palread - How digital maps avoid locking up the literature of the diaspora again into national borders
Case C: Holding the Voice -- putting literary metaphors, clinical classifications and experiencer knowledge on the same table
Case D: Institutional naming of the literature from the digital manuscript production chain to the later

region-greater-china.title: Greater China Research Field
region-greater-china.era: Network literature and autonomous knowledge systems
region-greater-china.region: Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, Taiwan
region-greater-china.lens: The digital story where the theory happens, the version chain.
region-greater-china.intro: A source-led atlas of Greater China Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-greater-china.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Greater China Research Field.
deepDive: The 2024 chapters of Wong propose “Cool Hong Kong's Chinese language approach” through the War Women's Convergence, the Closeness of Women Workers in the 1960s, Transregional Sex Sex Desires and the Transracial Desires of the Empire; and the writing of further studies on cross-literacy, film, visual culture, law and post-dissociation 2019. (Wong, 2024; Wong, 2025) The key method is not to encode the text by the already existing LGBTQ category, but to track the friction between “emotional history—dismissal of archives—media translation—legal structure”. This case can be read in conjunction with the queer decolonialities of the Philippines, and the African critical of the gender dimension in the West.

The Zong project has made VR ecological vulnerability of the cattle in Hong Kong a story of the ecological vulnerability of the cattle and links the Healing Atmospheres to the Hong Kong Medical Ethics/Humanist Unit. (Zong, 2026) Rather than treating the exhibition as “dissemination of results”, it is more appropriate to view it as a research method: text/image selection, spatial organization, participant experience and cross-professional collaboration itself to generate information. The risk is that the feeling of immersion may create the illusion that “the other understands”, so that records of decision-making, user feedback and failure should be kept.

Theory mechanisms. Zhang Jiang of the University of China Science and Social Sciences, who opposes the use of pre-literate theory as a means of “compulsory interpretation” and “public interpretation”, requires that individual interpretations be translated into public knowledge through text evidence, public reason and rebuttable discussions; this is a set of interpretative responsibility agreements that should not be used to close down multidimensionality. Cao Shuqing of the Sichuan University, University of Social Sciences, China, 2019; Zhang Jiang, 2021) raised the heterogeneity, increase, de-expand, misread and recoded translinguation of the translinguistic, intercultural transmission from the “noise” to the central target in the Comparative Literature Theory of Comparative Literature.
coreIdeas: “Diggle humanities” has shifted from the use of tools to the debate of cognitiveism. The annual official academic review summarized literature in terms of the digital humanities from tool applications to human-engineer synergies, and combined knowledge mapping, language libraries, GIS, social networks, literature computing and large models; and placed the “new popular arts” “global Southern literature” “New popular literature” “in China's autonomous literary knowledge system” on the high-frequency agenda. This review is an agenda-based source that does not determine national consensus but rather recognizes the common attention of policy-relations-higher schools.

Taiwan and Macao have entered the “knowledge base - research tools - open presentation” phase of a long-cycle digital collection. The DADH Conference and the AI/DHD Research Cluster are ongoing organizations of the DHD Centre for Human Studies; the Digital Cultural Centre of the Central Institute of Research has shifted its focus from 2026 to open digital human knowledge base; and the new phase of the Institute of History 2024 - emphasizes cross-courage authority control, ancient navigation and GIS.

The online literature became a comprehensive laboratory of platform capital, typologies, cross-media and AI. The Chinese online literature and literature book 2024, which China co-sponsored, documented parallel trends in reality, female subjects, folklore/wildness, science fiction, IP conversion, AI acousticization and hint engineering, and explicitly acknowledged that long auto-generation was still premature. The Institute of CyberLictology of the University of China in China has institutionalized “accompanied criticism”, documentation databases, evaluation systems and industry cooperation.

Hong Kong/Australian's front-line contribution is focused on the Chinese Language (Sinophone)+Cool/Trisex+ Comparison Approach and Ecohumanities. Alvin Ka Hin Wong, also under the signature of Alvin K. Wong, submitted Qier Hong Kong as a Sinopone method and unruly Comparison: instead of using Hong Kong as a localized sample of “China case” or Western cool theory, it is from non-conformity, friction and “minority”.
method: Unruly comparison: Recognition of non-conformity and relative violence among the target groups, without pursuing the same scale; study of the diversity of Hong Kong, Taiwan, and Trans-Chinese languages. (Wong, 2025)

The hybrid evidence approach to platform literature: platform data/annual reports, typology, readership studies, industry interviews and fine readings; the need to incorporate platform self-reported indicators, algorithmic visibility and review of the environment into bias analysis. (Center for Online Literature of the Chinese Writers Association, 2025; Institute of CyberLicterology, China-South University, 2023)

Digital version - Knowledge mapping - Space network chain: First version/metadata to be deconciled with entity, then network and spatial analysis, and finally back to reading and validation; no direct inference of ideas from word frequency. 2024, Beijing University, Chinese Language and Literature Department; Beijing University Institute of Artificial Intelligence, etc., 2024; Institute of Historical Languages, Central Institute, 2024)
Open uncertainty, ethical boundaries and the path to recovery.
cases: Case CN-A: WebLiction and Generating AI - “Alternative Author” is not the most accurate issue at this time
Case CN-B: Hong Kong as a place of theory, not an example
Case CN-C: Eco-Health - Research and Development of Digital Stories
Case CN-D: China ' s original theory and online literature cross-media version chain

region-japan-korea.title: Japan and Korea Research Field
region-japan-korea.lens: Declining recognition... disaster memory... survival together.
region-japan-korea.intro: A source-led atlas of Japan and Korea Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-japan-korea.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Japan and Korea Research Field.
deepDive: Hsu Jun-Hong compared the TF-DF by nouns, adjectives, verbs, distinguishing between “mary/shock” “memory/truth” “future action”, and explicitly recognizing that quantitative amounts are not sufficient to exhaust literary values. (허준행 Heo Jun-haeng, 2024) Zheng Young-jin uses “deprivation” to link his ethics to the State/neo-liberal responsibility. (정영진 Jeong Yeong-jin, 2024) The two combinations explain that the method of calculation is appropriate to establish a reviewable difference, that the theoretical reading is responsible for explaining why the difference is political; and that if only the word frequency is retained, the controversy is desterilized as a list of topics.

Huang Seng Jie has read the Rhoseid and Kim Hae-soon approaches, comparing the “hearing/care rhythm” with “the Union of the Unhumans/weaving of the ruins”, and has proposed poems that are not mirrors of the world, but rather devices for re-engineered relationships. (황선희 Hwang Seon-hui, 2025) This could create a cross-regional theory with Hong Kong, China, from alignment from below, Africa retaking for water; it should be noted that the evidence is the case of two poets and does not directly represent the entire 2020s Korean poem.
Japan and Korea link the co-existence to specific materials, institutional conditions and regions, and ask researchers to explain how evidence supports the claim.
coreIdeas: The classical Japanese studies have resulted in the national “image-OCR-speak-generated interactive” tube lines. The NIJL ' s 2024-2033 DDH 10-year plan is centred on Japanese literature and expands image, AI texting and analytical techniques. (National Institute of Japan Literature, 2024) Miwo/ KuroNet, KMNIST and Tsukushi advanced from character recognition to IIIF.

Post-earthquake literature remains the main axis of Japanese memory research and intersects with world literature, gender and the environment. The Riko Kimura considers 3/11 to be a break in the history of literature that needs to be rewritten, while studying the sex/gender structure of the Source Language. The special symposium on the theme of the World Literature, 2023, recorded in 2024, entered the knowledge base of the University of Tokyo, showing that the world literature of the marshland is still being discussed; Japan's “world literature” is not simply a translation of Damrosch, but rather a translation of Russian Eastern European experience.

The Japanese environmental literature has expanded from natural writing to the coolest ecofeminism, pollution history and more-than-human. The book 2023, which is a beautiful city, and the study 2024, will see the environment as a cross-section of cultural construction, material reality and political economy; the paper by Katoshi Nakamura to Yuko, a child in Zinjima, constitutes “cool ecofeminism” in the form of dead, animals, water and imaginary pregnancy.

Cognitive/neurological aesthetics are promoted in Japan by the Psychology Laboratory of the Ministry of Literature, but the study of literary cognitive studies is still adjacent to, not the same field. The University of Kanxi ' s Ishizu-sama laboratory uses brain function measurements, experimental psychology and quantitative comparative studies of beauty, sacrosanct, emotional and well-being; it can provide a method for reading and reaction research, but the available notes are mainly directed at visual arts and general aesthetics. Ishizu Tomohiro, n.d.
method: AI Auxiliary Version: OCR is no longer the end point; images, character frames, text, version metadata, the IIIF page and question and answer interface need to be tracked back. (National Institute of Papanece Literature, 2024; Center for Open Data in the Humanities, 2025)

Generating classical reading: Tsukushi allows for searching for ancient texts in modern Japanese, but research must also preserve model versions, retrieve evidence and uncertain answers to prevent "floating is correct". (Center for Open Data in the Humanities, 2025)

Two-track analysis of disasters: TF-IDF/Themes compares the distribution of terms, the theory of deprivation/trauma and the empirical description of ethical-political structures; the two are not substitutes for each other. (허준행 Heo Jun-haeng, 2024; 정영진 Jeong Yeong-jin, 2024)

Hsu Jun-Hong compared the TF-DF by nouns, adjectives, verbs, distinguishing between “mary/shock” “memory/truth” “future action”, and explicitly recognizing that quantitative amounts are not sufficient to exhaust literary values. (허준행 Heo Jun-haeng, 2024) Zheng Young-jin uses “deprivation” to link his ethics to the State/neo-liberal responsibility.
cases: Case JK-A: From “Reading unlit” to “dialogue with classical books”
Case JK-B: Tenth anniversary of the Viet Nam — quantifying not to eliminate ethical controversy
Case JK-C: "Saving Together" by the Korean poem

Asanobu Kitamotto, Tarin Clanuwat, and others, |CODH/NII/NIJL|KuroNet, miwo, KMNIST, Tsukushi, joins AI OCR, open data, IIIF and the generator reader into the classical literary research infrastructure.

region-south-southeast-asia.title: South and Southeast Asian Research Field
region-south-southeast-asia.lens: Version network Digital preservation Intellectual activism
region-south-southeast-asia.intro: A source-led atlas of South and Southeast Asian Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-south-southeast-asia.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of South and Southeast Asian Research Field.
deepDive: The DREAMSEA field cover paper, palm leaves, bark and multilingual Buddhist/Islamic manuscripts, with the term “receiving location/holder” being retained as a context. The scale of the first phase and the second phase of 2026 indicate that the project is of a continuing nature. (DREAMSEA, n.d.; PPIM UIN Jakarta, 2026) The official “Knowledge Activism” paper further noted that digital donations cannot replace the participation of holders. (Shofiyanti et al., 2026) The main report compares it with ACO, ALMEDA: Who decides the metadata matrix? Where's the server? How are the rights in original/image/relay distributed?

Garcia's 2024 paper viewed nationalism as both an anti-colonial resource and a possible framework for repressing/distinguishing differences; the classroom approach was thus read in parallel with classic criticism, local vocabulary and contemporary coolies. (Garcia, 2024) A poetry competition in Busilak offers teaching local language. The common denominator with Hong Kong unruly Comparison is the rejection of a single modern time line; the difference is that the Philippine case is more directly involved in the curriculum than in the national culture.

South and South-East Asia links the version of the network — digital preservation — to specific materials, institutional conditions and regional differences, and asks researchers to explain how the evidence supports the claim.
coreIdeas: South Asia's theoretical frontier has moved further from “post-colonial” to caste, anti-Brahmin intellectuals, testimony and declassification. The Dalit female testimonio study in Sharma Rege combines experience, coauthorship and resistance knowledge; Divya Dwivedi moves caste/racial criticism, non-natural narratives and “declassification” to 2024-2025.

Cognitive literature has a long indigenous line in India. Narrative Gravity of Rukmini Bhaya Nair has combined the theory of the political synthesis of speech, speech behaviour, cognitive science, culture and narratives, and IT Delhi official research notes also list the intercultural programs of emotion, gesture, eye action/fMRI. Its value lies in the matching of cognitive research with post-colonial/cultural differences, rather than in the elimination of linguistic differences by universal brain models.

Multilingualism and translation are not subsidiary themes, but are the basis of disciplines. The Indian Literature of Sahitya Akademi, which is based on the English translation of 23 Indian languages, also highlights Dalit, tribal/oral and LGBTQ poetry with the translation prize and the 2024 Literature Festival.

The digital textography case remains Bichitra, but the focus is on differences in versions rather than big data showcasing. The Jadavpur University online book of Tagore contains 47,520 pages of manuscripts and 91,637 pages of authoritative copies, full text transcriptions, retrieval and tertiary proofing. This has led to a shift from a single final version of the work to a network of self-retardable, tailored and bilingual versions.
method: (a) Dalit testimonio: self-reading as community testimony, counter-archiving and theoretical production, emphasizing who can represent and who has the authority to translate and edit. (Rege, 2006)

Post-colonial cognitive narratives: Nair combines words, speech behaviour, cultural emotions and cognitive mechanisms to provide a framework between experimental universalization and pure linguisticism. (Nair, 2003)

Online schoolbook (online variorum): use the difference between versions as a data structure; the research unit is a “variant relationship” and not a single text after cleaning. (Jadavpur University Bichitra team, 2013)

Living manuscripts/knowledge activism: digitally simultaneously document holders, religious practices, physical environment and local stories, avoiding the extraction of manuscripts from social life. (DREAMSEA, n.d.; Shofiyanti et al., 2026)
cases: Case SA-A: Bichitra How to Change the Body of “Tagore Works”
Case SA-B: DREAMSEA - Digital preservation is also a ownership politics
Case SA-C: Coole of the Philippines goes to colonial literature class

region-latin-america.title: Latin American Research Field
region-latin-america.lens: • Numerical origin of body-territory of mechanism criticism
region-latin-america.intro: A source-led atlas of Latin American Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-latin-america.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Latin American Research Field.
deepDive: The second structural feature is decolonization, ecology and the physical interlocking of media. Mignolo and Walsh's “concept-analysis-practice” chain, Escobar's “pluriversal politics” and Gómez-Barris' “inundated perspective” suggest approaches from knowledge, autonomy/design and extraction areas, rather than simply using post-colonialism as the subject of text. The third feature is material criticism of the world literary system: Locane tracks publishing houses, agents, translators, financial and aesthetic formats to produce a “Latin American literature” as a global commodity in circulation; and the study of world literature in Central America resists replacing the region with Mexico, Argentina, Brazil and “magic realism”. (Locane, 2019; Sophie Esch (ed. ), 2023)

Digital protobiography relies on Flash, browser plugins, social platforms, servers and author accounts, and works may disappear as a result of technology phase-out or commercial shutdowns. The Gainza Map Project identifies and preserves works before analysing narratives and poetry; Rocha's Brazilian warehouse processes classifications, metadata and displays simultaneously. The files here are not neutral containers: what is "Brazilian digital literature", whether social media writing is included, and how interactive versions are recorded, are producing literary history.

Recommended protocols: preservation of source files, operating environment videos, reader interactive paths, code/platform versions and author interviews; recording of invalid components rather than falsifying “complete recovery”; obtaining author and community authorization; setting up access levels for vulnerable or politically sensitive works; and placing maintenance costs and platform reliance on writing-in-writing methods.
coreIdeas: The institutional paradox of decolonization: English-North Press helps to spread concepts around the world and may also make decolonization a high-value academic brand. The report should record the theoretical origin, field/movement relationship, place of publication and the proceeds of reference respectively. (Mignolo et al., 2018; Escobar, 2020)

Archives and extraction: Digital preservation may bring social works into unauthorized reuse or model training. Openness should not be tacitly accepted as unlimited download; “is available” and “is available for extraction” need to be separated. (Rocha, 2022; Kozak, 2024)

The digital divide is wrong: writing down low bandwidth/old equipment as being backward would ignore the strategic use of limited technology by artists; but romantic want would also mask inequality. (Kozak, 2023)

Internal disparities within “Latin America”: the evidence of the draft is clearly biased towards the publication of Argentina, Chile, Brazil and transnational English; Andean, Caribbean, Central America, Haiti/French-speaking Community, First Nations language coverage is still inadequate. The study of the world literature in Central America is only the starting point for correction. (Sofie Esch (ed. ), 2023)
method: Digital protobiography relies on Flash, browser plugins, social platforms, servers and author accounts, and works may disappear as a result of technology phase-out or commercial shutdowns. The Gainza Map Project identifies and preserves works before analysing narratives and poetry; Rocha's Brazilian warehouse processes classifications, metadata and displays simultaneously. The files here are not neutral containers: what is "Brazilian digital literature", whether social media writing is included, and how interactive versions are recorded, are producing literary history.

Recommended protocols: preservation of source files, operating environment videos, reader interactive paths, code/platform versions and author interviews; recording of invalid components rather than falsifying “complete recovery”; obtaining author and community authorization; setting up access levels for vulnerable or politically sensitive works; and placing maintenance costs and platform reliance on writing-in-writing methods.

Kozak rejects a homogeneous global South with a “Souths” plural and re-incorporates linguistic hegemony, material-technical conditions and institutional resource inequalities into digital literature analysis. (Kozak, 2023) Her “anarchivism” does not lack files, but questions their ownership, classification and colonial data order. (Kozak, 2024) The study of electronic texts therefore cannot be a screen reading, but also tracks the infrastructure, platform conditions and maintenance work on which the works depend.

The Al-Mundo of Kozak 2025 sees AI as a worldwide device, not a single tool, for infiltration into language, perception, education, art and governance; the aesthetics of the so-called “go to the centre of humanity” may mask the geology, data and material conditions of hegemonic digital devices. (Kozak, 2025) The “critical experimentalism” she proposed allowed artists to use models but required that their works be exposed, interfered with or re-engineered.
cases: Case A: From Maps to Storage - Object-building in Latin American Digital Literature
Case B: AI-Mundo - An AI literary study on how to do “critical but still experimental”

1 Decolonisation, Pluralism and the Global South Knowledge Politics 10/10 Monographs, Digital Literature Criticism, Ecology/Indigenous Studies are mutually reinforcing; the core is knowledge production relationships, not the addition of “South” (Kozak, 2023; Mignolo et al., 2018; Escobar, 2020; Gómez-Barris, 2017)

region-africa.title: African Research Field
region-africa.lens: Elemental methods: Decolonisation metadata, language practice.
region-africa.intro: A source-led atlas of African Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-africa.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of African Research Field.
deepDive: ALMEDA found that the standard of official libraries tends to include ISBN monographs and stable authors, unofficial poetry, oral, festivals and the publication of African languages, and thus disappears from the search. The team chooses to be independent Wikibase instead of directly subject to Wikidata's existing headings and creates a multilingual, linked mobile body. This makes the “missing of metadata” evidence of colonial knowledge history. The risk lies in the fact that the project is dominated by European funds and Uppsala; the true decolonization depends on the sustainability of the African partners in deciding on the categories, hosting and correcting.

Jalada not only discusses writing in the mother tongue, but organizes the same story to be published in a cross-African language; African Storybook supports children ' s multilingual reading in open licences, graphics/audio and remixable formats. (Jalada Africa 2020; African Storybook, n.d.) Both transform “language politics” into a production/distribution mechanism and also expose translation asymmetries: which languages have editors, formal linguists, fonts and digital tools and which can only be trans-redacted in English. The research indicators should not be limited to a few languages, but should also examine the signature of the interpreter, community use, return flow and the sustainability of the server.

The Africa Research Site links the elemental approach — decolonisation metadata — language practices to specific materials, institutional conditions and regional differences, and asks researchers to explain how evidence supports the claim.
coreIdeas: The colonial study goes from “content representation” to language, metadata, home body and server. The language politics of the Ngolk, which is still a trend, has been transformed into a publishing mechanism by the pan-African translation practice of Jalala; and ALMEDA has gone further by using a multilingual Wikibase to reflect on why colonial library standards make small publications, oral, performances and unofficial publications invisible.

Southern Africa has produced a global water/ocean theory with greater global impact. Hydrocolonism of Isabel Hofmeyr links land and sea, empire, environment, customs, copyright and censorship; rewriting for water is a literary area with rain, rivers, sewers, groundwater, marine distress and water privatization. (Hofmeyr, 2019; Hofmeyr, 2022; Hofmeyr et al., 2024; Hofmeyr et al., 2022)

The environment is being transformed from an “ecological theme” to a physical, infrastructural, extraction and care environment. The Planetary Hinterlands of Sarah Nuttall and others studied the colonial heritage, capital extraction, abandonment and more-than-human care; Brutalism of Achille Mbembe linked capital, digital technology, human deformation and planetary destruction. (Gupta et al., 2024; Mbembe, 2024)

AI Relationship with oral/sound is an urgent issue. The 2024 South African Folklore Society, sponsored by UCT, directly focused on the theme “Oral freedom and the experts and the effects of AI”; and DHASA 2025, on the theme “The role of humanities in digital and AI”, illustrated that the focus of the discussion was not following models but rather the right to information, language resources and human judgement.
method: Reading for water: tracing water sensory, political and dynamic; literary areas can be defined by watersheds, coasts, monsoons and water knowledge rather than by the State. (Hofmeyr et al., 2024; Hofmeyr et al., 2022)
Panimist materialism: Rejecting the “traditional spirituality/modern technology” dichotomy, the power of the confluence of objects, gods, goods, machines and politics. (Garuba, 2003)

(c) To colonize metadata/mobile: to annex the concept of African without English; to allow performances, orals, small publications, festivals and editions to have their own structure of description. (Aangenendt et al., 2025)

Oral - AI Audit: Address voice consent, community control, dialectal error recognition and voice personality rights before voice recognition, transliteration, translation and generation. (Southern African Folklore Society et al., 2024)

Case AF-B: ALMEDA - Directory is not a neutral packaging
Case AF-C: Language practice from Decolonisation Mind to Jalada/Storybook

Isabel Hofmeyr|Wits/WiSER|Dockside Reaging (2022); hydrocolonism| merges the history of material books and the marine environment through customs, ports, copyright, censorship and book voyages. (Hofmeyr, 2019; Hofmeyr, 2022)

region-middle-east-arab.title: Middle Eastern and Arab Research Field
region-middle-east-arab.region: Middle East, North Africa and the Arabic-speaking world
region-middle-east-arab.lens: Text re-entry .. women's files ..to witness boundaries
region-middle-east-arab.intro: A source-led atlas of Middle Eastern and Arab Research Field, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-middle-east-arab.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Middle Eastern and Arab Research Field.
deepDive: Elsadda's monographs do not add a female chapter to the existing classics, but rather demonstrate that the country-gender imagination is involved in the production of the classics themselves. (Elsadda, 2012) WMF further exposes oral history of female broadcasters, publishers, anti-Female Genital Mutilation activists, etc., to the research of voice, professional history and action networks. This approach turns “who is saved, who can describe, who has the right to re-use” into a research issue that can be read in conjunction with DREAMSEA, ALMEDA.

Masharqa selects three non-professional youth lecturers to analyse 175, 103, 58 videos, defined as 2023-10-08 to 2025-01-19; focus on character creation, humor, hysteria, sound/clip and interaction. (Masharqa, 2025) This is not a quick reference to short video as “new literature”, but rather a representation that the subject of narrative research has crossed the print media. The study also exposed the meta deletions, algorithmic visibility and the loss of information; the replicatation study required the retention of time stamp, link status, transcribation/relay and ethical descriptions.

The Middle East and the Arab World reproduces the text — the female file — to witness the link between borders to specific materials, institutional conditions and regional differences, and to ask researchers to explain how evidence supports the claim.
coreIdeas: The core of the Arabic digital humanities has moved from “scans” to computational text, text reuse and open versions. Arabian Collactions Online (ACO) provides Arabic books in the public domain; OpenITI provides source, metadata, sustainable citation and open standards; KITAB detects text re-use on OpenITI with passim and publishes 10GB-level open matching data.

The feminist archives and oral history are one of the most original literary and cultural research infrastructures in Egypt. The General, National, and the Arab Novel, of Hoda Elsadda, have developed a common analysis of masculinity, femininity, state and classical culture; Women and Memoory Forum (WMF) has continued to build oral files of female pioneers, actors, publishers and health advocates.

Palestinian research is driven from memory/trauma to witness, imprisonment, digital micro-story and “writing as hope”. The Pluralistic Memories of Birzeit link individual/collective memory with in-depth visits, representative surveys and creative writing; Basil Farraj, a political subject in detention from hunger protest research; and Saleh Masharqa, analysing 336 Gaza youth videos from 2023-10-2025-01, which bring humor, sound, clipping, platform interaction and micro-story.

Ecocriticism, animal research and Gulf literature are on the rise. The Qatar University study established the Qatari case of “environmental novels” in the Dal Khalifa novel; the AUC's Alif 45 (2025) links literature, art, science, censorship and political prowess, with the theme “animal cultural expression”. (Belabed, 2023; Alif: Journal of Commercial Poetics, 2025)
method: The gender-based paradigm is based on the analysis of male and female personalities in Elsadda, and the tracking of the country ' s projects to determine who enters the modern Arab novel history. (Elsadda, 2012)

Gender sensitive oral history: Treat interview relationships, silence, family/institutional power, anonymity and re-use permits as part of methodology, not as transparent facts. (Elsadda, n.d. ; Women and Memory Forum, n.d.)

Emancipated Knowledge/Research: Birzeit focuses on local problems, participatory archives and anti-colonial theory production; the institutional situation of researchers must be taken into account in anti-reform. (Haddad, 2024; Birzeit University, n.d.)
Open uncertainty, ethical boundaries and the path to recovery.

Case ME-B: Women and Memoory Forum - from women to the rewriting of the archives
Case ME-C: Gaza Digital Teller - The Movement of Literature, Media and Witness Borders

region-eastern-europe.title: Russia, Ukraine, and Eastern Europe
region-eastern-europe.lens: Emergency digital humanities Rethinking position, central literary history
region-eastern-europe.intro: A source-led atlas of Russia, Ukraine, and Eastern Europe, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
region-eastern-europe.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Russia, Ukraine, and Eastern Europe.
deepDive: But “decolonization” is not an undisputed consensus. Kevin Platt reminds us that the colonial discourse must listen to the voices of the places/objects that are represented by others and understand the experience caught in multiple imperial relations with the use of “inter-imperiality”. (Platt, 2025) The 2026 paper by Ulrich Hofmeister, by comparing Ukraine with Russian Turkistan, advocates a careful distinction between colonialism and Russian, and opposes the obfuscation of different structures of domination as a single colonial relationship. The debate itself is at the forefront: the question is no longer “the ability to use post-colonial theories”, but rather how to build a concept that is historically distinguishable, politically inescapable and that allows the silence to speak out.

The second change is that literary research is directly linked to cultural survival. SUCHO launched distributed web site preservation in March 2022; project files record the results of the thousands of websites and dozens of TB data, project papers/topic shorts to analyse volunteers, technology and ethics organizations. The third change is the dual track of computing literature: Polish DARIAH-PL, Czech poetry and DraCor continue to advance style measurement, literary geography, poetry and programmable drama; Russian classic Tolstoy Digital also demonstrates the potential of words, but institutional environments, access, language centre and war ethics must be included in evaluation.

The old curriculum is often dominated by Russian literature, with the addition of “minority/Soviet national literature”. Dobrenko and Smola advocate studying the “near-speech” and non-synchronous life histories of socialist realism in different republics, regions and periods, which means that the comparator should change from a central prototype/local deviation to a multiple local occupation, consultation and deviation of the system. (Dobrenko et al., 2023) Pavlyshyn's guide, which is retrospected from the present reaction of Ukrainian literature, incorporates Polish, Russian, Jewish and Crimean Tatar culture, with the model “Ukrainian-centred but without a new monolingual history of closure”. (Pavlyshyn, 2025)
coreIdeas: The concept of decolonization had expanded: if any inequality was called colonization, the concept would lose its comparative power; if the colonial perspective was rejected because history was not fully in line with the overseas colonial model, it would also obscure conquest, linguistic repression and sovereignty denial. Mechanisms are needed to break down rather than to label. (Hofmeister, 2026; Platt, 2025)

The need for a central Ukraine should not be eliminated from Jewish, Crimean Tatar, Polish, Russian-speaking Ukraine and mixed identities. Pavlyshyn's multilingual cultural framework provides a more balanced entry point. (Pavlyshyn, 2025)

War’s current nature and evaluation ethics: Researchers cannot demand that war writing be in peacetime aesthetic or excuse text/evidence from criticism for political sympathy. The functions of testimony, mobilization, journalism, poetry and late literature should be distinguished.

Russian culture is the wrongs of the State apparatus: the research of the creation of national memory must preserve dissent, exile, ethnic minorities and the oppressed authors; in turn, the emphasis on cultural autonomy cannot deny the imperial nature of the classical system. (Dobrenko et al., 2023; McGlynn, 2023)
method: The old curriculum is often dominated by Russian literature, with the addition of “minority/Soviet national literature”. Dobrenko and Smola advocate studying the “near-speech” and non-synchronous life histories of socialist realism in different republics, regions and periods, which means that the comparator should change from a central prototype/local deviation to a multiple local occupation, consultation and deviation of the system.

Methodological requirements: the language of the work, the self-identification of the author, the administrative boundaries, the place of publication and the acceptance of the Community code; the same author may belong to a number of literary networks; “Russian writing” cannot automatically be equated with “Russian literature”; the translation of names, place names and rules on transliteration shall indicate political/linguistic choices.

Annus and Tlostanova have demonstrated that post-colonial/decolonization reveals modern hierarchies, frontier subjects and cultural resistance of the Soviet Union and post-socialism. The latest forum called for a second round of reflection: Hofmeister, which compares land, immigration, legal isolation and domination with the idea that “colonialism” cannot be used without distinction simply because of conquest; Platt, who demands to hear those who are both affected by the Soviet Empire and in the German/Po/Othman/Western Empire relationship.

The study should establish a conceptual checklist: territorial conquest, settlement colonization, ethnic/legal differences, resource transfer, language repression, intellectual hierarchies, sovereign denial of separate evidence; and allowing different mechanisms to coexist but not to seek the same name. Authors are also required to report on their language skills, institutional location, war relations and archival competence.
cases: Case A: Does decolonization apply to all Eastern Europe? - Designing the argument for test comparison
Case B: SUCHO - When is preservation a literary research method?
Case C: DraCor-stylo - Czech Poetry - Central and Eastern Europe is not a passive inputer of the method of calculation

1 The centralization of Russia, the re-construction of the Empire/colonial and discipline 10/10 Institute themes, periodical clusters, critical forums, 2026 conceptual and academic papers together constitute ongoing controversy (Association for Slavic, East European, and European Studies, 2023; Dobrenko, etc., 2023; Hofmeister, 2026; Platt, 20).

institutions-data-visibility.title: Data, Institutions, and Visibility
institutions-data-visibility.lens: Visibility politics Data inequality Transparency protocols
institutions-data-visibility.intro: A source-led atlas of Data, Institutions, and Visibility, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
institutions-data-visibility.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Data, Institutions, and Visibility.
deepDive: The report consolidates 258 source records, removing DOI or duplicated title, resulting in approximately 246 stand-alone outcomes/projects. The source was not a sample of national quotas, but rather the establishment of retrospective evidence nodes for the subject of nine districts 11; the figure below therefore only presents the evidentiary composition of the report and cannot be interpreted as the true production of the districts. North America and Europe have a larger number of entries, partly from English and DOI visibility, and partly from cross-regional theoretical/methodological sources, labelled as “global” or “North America”; and Africa, South/South-East Asia and the Middle East have a high proportion of institutional project pages, reflecting the priority given to local infrastructure during the current round and uneven data from peer reviews.

The front line of the journal is not simply a “new list of topics”, but rather how the editorial system requires researchers to rewrite evidence. For example, digital and computational humanistic journals increasingly require data, codes, narratives and error analyses; literary theoretical journals reconnect technology with power through AI, environment, translation or decolonization. Four institutional developments were observed in the special theme and meetings of 2024-2026:

However, the subject numbers and the presentation only proved editorial attention and did not prove that results had stabilized. For meetings/plans not completed in 2026, the report uses the “agenda signal” label; results are only obtained from official online journal articles, books and data sets. This distinction avoids the development of future plans as a fait accompli and the misperception of the advocacy capacity of large institutions as a theoretical influence.
coreIdeas: AI is entering the literary approach. Journals and copyright agencies began to demand disclosure of AI uses, author qualifications and sources of content generation; policies are still changing, academic reports should set models and dates, and not use global assertions such as “AI is legal/illegal”. (U.S. Copyright Office, 2025; UNECO Expert Group on Artificial Intelligence and Culture, 2025)

The environment humanities move from thematic to horizontal frameworks. Climate, blue humanities, energy, toxicity and multi-species issues are integrated into world literature, memory, health, sound and media research, and are no longer covered exclusively by ecological criticism. (Chakrabarty, 2021; DeLoughey, 2019; Liboiron, 2021)

The move from colonization to institutional auditing. Courses, archives, metadata, translation, open licences, co-authorship and data sovereignty are part of the evaluation project. (D'Ignazio et al., 2020; Fiormonte et al., 2022; Smith, 2021)

The methodology is transparent and is spilled over from the field of calculations. Archiving research also describes gaps and survival biases; participatory research describes consent and governance; cognitive experiments describes efficacy, stimulation and extrapolation; and explanatory papers increasingly require cross-references and locationality. (Beelen et al., 2025; Jacobs, 2015; Aslı Zengin, 2024)
method: The report recommends that a long front-line overview be made available at least as follows:
(a) Single reference key, DOI/URL, duplicate record processing;
AI Scope of assistance, version/date, manual or independent review chain;
Three rounds of review, amended records and remaining restrictions.

contemporary-debates.title: Six Contemporary Debates
contemporary-debates.lens: Computation and interpretation . LLM Authority . Prosthetic reading
contemporary-debates.intro: A source-led atlas of Six Contemporary Debates, preserving the complete Chinese research chapter while mapping its evidence, methods, debates, and regional cases.
contemporary-debates.door: Open this volume to enter the evidence world of Six Contemporary Debates.
deepDive: The acceptable compromise is not to add text examples to the model results, but to create a cycle: reading into the meso-demography -- Small samples are manually marked - model extensions - error clusters - abnormal text is read back - redefinition of text and frame. If the overall content is unknown, the conclusions should be reduced to “digitized pools”; if the cross-language model is validated in English only, it cannot be called “general literary law”; and if the cluster changes significantly with the parameters, the results should be reported as exploratory.

Criteria for determining whether the calculations have created new literary questions that can be refuted. Is the text and error publicly available? Is there a language/historical expert who explains anomalies? If the answer is no, the scale will only magnify the existing bias.

All three types of descriptions may be established at different levels. LLM can simulate some type of reader response, participate in the production of candidate texts, or serve as an unauditable database interface for training memory. Research on physical recognition, story-generation and automatic evaluation shows that models can go beyond old indicators in a given task but are influenced by the memory of popular works, pre-training distribution, self-preference and inadequate interpretation. (Hicke et al., 2025; Tian et al., 2024; Chhun et al., 2024)
coreIdeas: (b) To modify the classification of participants' knowledge so that “participation” is not a pro bono contribution;
Let non-disclosure become a justified ethical design, while open decision-making paths.
Converting restorative reading into an observable and questionable analytical dimension.
Converting calculations and interpretations into observable and questionable analytical dimensions.
method: Describe research issues, location and access to materials.
Sets a scale correspondence between reading, computing or experiment.
The interpretation of constraints is verified by case, reverse and triangulation.
Open uncertainty, ethical boundaries and the path to recovery.

deepDive: Classic, copyright-based and locally published versions are selected from three languages in common, with layers of original/manual/machine translations; name mask, spectrosm, traditional taxonomy and expert blind reviews. The main result is training memory and cross-verbal error rather than a single accuracy rate. (Hicke et al., 2025; Li, 2019)

Collect codes, output, equipment, author interviews, performances and re-enactments, distinguishing rules, randomness, combinations, statistics and large model phases. The absence of records by language/area to avoid writing English electronic literature into the entire history of machine literature. (Bertram et al. 2024; Ernst et al. 2012)

Create a digital newspaper for a country/language against a reference catalogue, with a hierarchy of cities, parties, languages, age, layout and OCR errors; judge the range of literary history that can be answered with an Envirronmental Scan, rather than treating undigitized as unpublished. (Beelen et al., 2025)
coreIdeas: High: There are three types of indicators of results, institutions and methodologies in multiple regions and there are persistent drivers.
Medium height: Cross-thematic convergence and institutional nodes exist, but regional coverage or methodological norms are not yet uniform.
Medium: Agenda signals are visible, early cases are credible, and institutionalization depends on funding, ethics or replication.
How the object is formed: audit language, version, archive, platform and missing.
method: Describe research issues, location and access to materials.
Sets a scale correspondence between reading, computing or experiment.
The interpretation of constraints is verified by case, reverse and triangulation.
Open uncertainty, ethical boundaries and the path to recovery.
cases: Topic 1: Multilingual LLM Stigma Blindness
Topic 2: Global production of literary archives (1950s-now)
Topic 3: Missing Maps in the Historical Newspaper
Topic 4: The history of literature in uncertain times

The “latest” of Latin American literature research cannot be judged by the growth of English-language keywords alone. The region ' s achievements are numerous in Spanish, Portuguese, open warehousing, collective projects and public platforms, often with innovations that have been created to targets that were not present before or that could disappear at any time. frontier-paradigm-shifts.title: Mutations paradigmatiques
frontier-paradigm-shifts.lens: Le portefeuille de données probantes • Le concept de distribution • Recherches utiles
frontier-paradigm-shifts.intro: Un atlas documentaire de Mutations paradigmatiques, qui conserve le chapitre chinois intégral et cartographie ses preuves, méthodes, débats et cas régionaux.
frontier-paradigm-shifts.door: Ouvrez ce volume pour entrer dans le monde documentaire de Mutations paradigmatiques.
deepDive: Les points chauds ont été jugés cinq dimensions : publication récente d'examen par les pairs et liens vers des sujets, centres de recherche, projets et infrastructures de données, innovations méthodologiques, prolifération interrégionale et questions publiques. Le code interne pour chaque 0-2 est utilisé uniquement pour identifier les formes relatives dans le pool de preuves de ce rapport, qui ne peut pas être ajouté à travers les régions ou extrapolé du classement - -world. Les réunions, conférences et visites en cours en 2026 ne se déroulent que sur le « radar frontal »; la dernière année complète de tendance est 2025.

Le décalage de 5 fois ci-dessous est une proposition composite explicative de preuves transrégionales, non pas un fait statistique obtenu mécaniquement par les cinq indicateurs, ni l'affirmation que tous les pays, langues et écoles se déplacent en tandem. Les conditions minimales pour leur établissement sont les suivantes : changement réciproque d'objet, réorganisation des méthodes ou conflit de responsabilité dans au moins deux régions et deux types de preuves; et maintien des zones inversées et découvertes par les chapitres régionaux et le chapitre 24. Le rôle du cadre consiste donc à comparer l'organisation avec la présentation de questions réfragables, plutôt que de déclarer que le paradigme uniforme a été achevé.

Cette distinction est particulièrement importante car la plateforme de métadonnées récompense systématiquement l'anglais, la DOI, l'abstrait ouvert et les grandes institutions. Open Alex est un index académique ouvert et récapitulable, mais sa couverture et sa reconnaissance conceptuelle sont encore influencées par les sources et les langues; la carte de tendance qui suit dans ce rapport est basée sur une réponse à -Combien est un label concept en anglais visible dans le titre/résumé - et pas -Combien d'études sont là dans le monde -. (Priem et al. 2022)
coreIdeas: Cibler les modifications : Extension du texte imprimé aux plateformes, aux modèles, aux voix, aux infrastructures cliniques et environnementales.

Géorévision : expansion de la production théorique du Centre euro-américain à l'Amérique latine, en Afrique, en Asie, au Moyen-Orient et en Europe centrale et orientale, avec traduction et non traduction de documents.
Amendements méthodologiques : Exiger des matières nucléaires conceptuelles et négatives, le spectre des données et la prise de décisions éthiques.
Convertir le portefeuille de preuves en une dimension analytique observable et douteuse.
method: Décrire les questions de recherche, l'emplacement et l'accès aux documents.
Définit une correspondance à l'échelle entre la lecture, l'informatique ou l'expérience.
L'interprétation des contraintes est vérifiée au cas par cas, inversement et triangulation.
L'incertitude ouverte, les limites éthiques et la voie du rétablissement.
cases: Le nouveau concept fournit-il les mécanismes d ' interprétation qui faisaient défaut auparavant? AI-Mundo, hydrocolonialisme, coparaison irréfléchie + texte original + au moins un signal ultérieur d'adoption/de contestation

Pourquoi l'ancienne théorie a-t-elle relancé le concept classique du classique et retrouvé son interprétation dans de nouvelles conditions ? Réinterprétation des nouveaux objets/méthodes dans les années 2020

La méthode de migration a-t-elle changé la question qui peut être posée lorsqu'elle entre dans la recherche littéraire? Vérification de mémoire LLM, Réseau de réutilisation de texte, Méthode de lecture de texte longue et oculaire Note + Erreur/frontière empirique + Interprétation de la littérature Relecture

Les périodiques, réunions, financement et plateformes de l'ordre du jour institutionnel sont-ils restructurés pour étudier l'écologie? Infrastructure multilingue, humanités numériques d'urgence, signaux critiques de humanités médicales d'au moins deux types; les réunions ne peuvent pas être des degrés de maturité distincts

frontier-methodology-map.title: Atlas méthodologique
frontier-methodology-map.lens: Contrat de preuve Validation triangulaire Courant
frontier-methodology-map.intro: Un atlas documentaire de Atlas méthodologique, qui conserve le chapitre chinois intégral et cartographie ses preuves, méthodes, débats et cas régionaux.
frontier-methodology-map.door: Ouvrez ce volume pour entrer dans le monde documentaire de Atlas méthodologique.
deepDive: John Guillory définit la lecture en détail (*On Close Reading*) comme une technologie culturelle ─ les chercheurs peuvent démontrer comment prendre note des mots, phrases, citations, relations formelles et contexte, ou peut former une telle attention sans épuiser le jugement comme un ensemble de règles mécaniques; Scott Newstok, la signature publique de l'auteur, prépare une bibliographie annotée pour le livre et non un co-auteur non différencié. Les critiques étaient également réversibles en tant qu'actions écrites vérifiables : exactitude des citations, équité de l'interprétation, résumé factuel de la sélectivité, dispositivité du jugement narratif étayée par des détails textuels, et traitement authentique d'exemples rétrogressifs.

Ce triangle modifie la pseudo-relation du calcul détaillé de -- : la lecture fournit un jugement local qui peut être argumenté publiquement, et l'informatique fournit une mesure, une distribution et une anomalie, qui doivent tous deux démontrer une chaîne de raisonnements du matériel à la revendication. Ils ne peuvent pas introduire -détaillé lecture comme la seule façon - ou faux jugements littéraires comme une réplique complète des sciences naturelles; les critères plus appropriés sont la disponibilité de la version, la disponibilité de la preuve, les étapes exemplifiantes, la régression, l'examen par les pairs raisonnable.

c) Identifier la cible, l'échelle, la langue, le moment et l'emplacement du chercheur. L'étude de la littérature asiatique doit décrire comment l'Asie est définie; l'étude des œuvres en langue russe ne peut pas automatiquement être classée comme littérature russe; et l'étude des matériaux autochtones devrait décrire la relation entre le chercheur et la communauté. Il faudrait répondre à cette question par des preuves, plutôt que de faire figurer un jugement de grande valeur dans une mission de recherche.
coreIdeas: Matériel linguistique: total de clarté, échantillonnage, droit d'auteur, langue, version, qualité de la ROC, âge et sexe/déficit géographique.
Caractéristiques: Une explication de la raison pour laquelle il est littéraire et ne remplace pas la théorie par la commodité du modèle.
Validation : Base de référence, configuration, sensibilité des paramètres, aveuglement manuel, valeur anormale en arrière.

Explication : Distinguer les caractéristiques connexes, les performances de classification, les mécanismes et les causes et conséquences historiques; interdire la désignation directe des genres par un groupe.
method: La question principale de la méthodologie n'est pas - Quel logiciel est utilisé -, mais -quelle est la base de cette conclusion de ces matériaux -. La méthode utilisée est comprise dans le présent rapport comme un contrat entre la réclamation et les éléments de preuve. Toute étude devrait répondre à quatre questions : Qu'est-ce que l'unité de recherche? Comment le matériel pénètre-t-il dans l'échantillon? Comment les étapes analytiques peuvent-elles changer le matériel? Quel résultat aurait renversé l'explication?
Figure 3 Relations de validation à l'échelle des matériaux pour la lecture, l'archivage, l'informatique, l'expérimentation, les méthodes participatives et médiatiques
Lit le livre de connaissances : les compétences qui peuvent être affichées, pas l'instinct mystérieux ou l'algorithme fixe

John Guillory définit la lecture en détail (*On Close Reading*) comme une technologie culturelle ─ les chercheurs peuvent démontrer comment prendre note des mots, phrases, citations, relations formelles et contexte, ou peut former une telle attention sans épuiser le jugement comme un ensemble de règles mécaniques; Scott Newstok, la signature publique de l'auteur, prépare une bibliographie annotée pour le livre et non un co-auteur non différencié.
cases: Comment utiliser le récit, la rhétorique, le rythme, le son et l'ambiguïté de l'œuvre, la version, la traduction du texte, le contre-cas, les compétences en langage et en langage, la fréquence globale ou l'effet causal de la zone

Le concept d'histoire des archives et des livres, les classiques, l'auteur et le système d'édition, comment former l'expérience complète de groupes en dehors des archives, les manuscrits, les lettres, les catalogues, les journaux, la sélection de la bibliothèque de traduction, le manquant et la déclaration de l'autorité d'archivage
Comment changer la langue originale/traduction, critiques de livres, cours, journaux de la chaîne de publication, spectre de traduction, équipe multilingue non soutenue -impact global -

Calculer l'importance et la valeur historiques des schémas de texte/réseaux, la façon dont les anomalies et les relations sont distribuées à plus grande échelle, le texte structuré, les métadonnées, le spectre de texte en ligne, la validation de la langue, la numérisation des paramètres, les modèles liés à la version de code

digital-humanities.title: Humanités numériques
digital-humanities.lens: Critiques sur les infrastructures du modèle linguistique
digital-humanities.intro: Un atlas documentaire de Humanités numériques, qui conserve le chapitre chinois intégral et cartographie ses preuves, méthodes, débats et cas régionaux.
digital-humanities.door: Ouvrez ce volume pour entrer dans le monde documentaire de Humanités numériques.
deepDive: La mondialisation est également passée de la transformation des outils anglais au monde à la conversion en technologies multilingues, à la cartographie des connaissances locales, à la gouvernance des données autochtones, à l'infrastructure et aux inégalités dans le Sud. Les données mondiales dans les humanités numériques mettent en relation les pays africains, latino-américains, sud-asiatiques, chinois et russes au Centre de théorie des données; Le féminisme des données exige l'audit de projets de données provenant du pouvoir, de la classification binaire, des données manquantes, du travail et de la co-conception (Fiormonte et al., 2022; D'Ignazio et al., 2020).

Questions d'application : Changements à long terme de la structure corporelle, prolifération des types, réseaux de traduction, relations personnelles, écologie périodique, narrations spatiales, variations dans les versions. Sans objet/risque élevé: la langue n'est pas connue en général, mais prétend être représentative de toute la littérature; très petite langue utilise des modèles à haute paramétrique; aucune comparaison entre les langues par des spécialistes de la langue; le texte protégé est réédité. Le triangle «Calculer la découverte - Archivage - Interprétation détaillée» est préféré.

Distinction conceptuelle. --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Les trois ne peuvent pas être compressés pour "lire dans un logiciel". Mécanismes de base. Ted Underwood, dans *Distant Horizons: Digital Experience and Literary Change*, interprète le modèle comme un dispositif de visionnement: les chercheurs transforment d'abord l'histoire littéraire en une fonctionnalité observable, puis l'examinent dans différents langages, paramètres et spectrométrie à coupe temporelle, puis reviennent à l'interprétation manquante de l'œuvre, de l'histoire de la publication et des archives. La valeur du modèle n'est pas de prononcer un sens au nom des autres, mais d'exposer une certaine intuition historique au contraire.
coreIdeas: La langue n'est pas neutre : la collection numérique est un produit de choix, le droit d'auteur, la coopération commerciale, la préservation et la performance de l'OCR. Beelen et d'autres ont présenté le Scan environnemental dans les archives de presse britannique et s'est opposé au Panorama (Beelen et al., 2025) par ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Comment les résultats du modèle deviennent des preuves littéraires : la précision élevée de la classification ne permet que de marquer les caractéristiques et n'indique pas automatiquement leur signification historique littéraire. Les documents qualifiés doivent indiquer les niveaux de référence, la confusion entre le temps et l'auteur, les fuites de données, les déséquilibres de catégorie, les erreurs de texte et les théories alternatives (Da, 2019; Bode, 2023; Hicke, etc., 2025).

L'incertitude n'est pas liée au nettoyage du bruit : Undate conserve l'incertitude relative au temps humain dans les dates spatiales, multichronologiques et incomplètes, et démontre -l'information du jugement théorique dans les structures de données et la description publique de - (Koeser et al., 2025).

Interpretable et la pollution de la mémoire: LLM peut apprendre à la fois le style et le texte populaire. L'identification de la source d'indice, la formation, la perturbation du texte et la détection interne doivent être combinées, et la précision de la boîte noire ne peut pas être appelée -compréhension (Hicke et al., 2025).
method: Protocole linguistique : Temps, langue, type, sous-bande, copyright, couverture globale et numérique attendue; source et version réservées à chaque texte.

Exploration et modélisation: La fréquence/la clé de mots est le point de départ, peut être mesurée de manière stylistique, sujet/entrée, classification supervisée, réseau de personnes, information géographique et modèle de série; une simple base de données et une spécification temporelle sont nécessaires.

Validation : Certification croisée divisée par travail/auteur plutôt que par phrase aléatoire; remplacement de l'étiquette, digestion, noyau artificiel aveugle, analyse de sensibilité et cas négatifs.

Retour à la littérature : extraction de textes de défauts et d'anomalies du modèle, lecture de leur contexte rhétorique, style et édition ; traduction des différences statistiques en titres littéraires réfractaires.
cases: Ted Underwood fait de la preuve télévisée un enjeu de changement littéraire plutôt que d'afficher simplement des outils (Underwood, 2019) La publication anglaise d'exemples historiques ne peut pas représenter directement la littérature mondiale.

Les auteurs de la revue Hicke & Mimno/Cornell, qui a 80 ans, sont de 30 auteurs; ils comparent les SVM, Delta et LLM et font la mémoire, la perturbation et la détection (Hicke et coll., 2025) la stylisation est pertinente pour l'âge; l'effet de la mémoire de l'auteur de portes chaudes est évident

Beelen et al./University of London, Alan Turing Institute et d'autres, ont divisé les cas manquants en cas de couverture, de divergence, de partisanisme et de mise en place d'un calibrage des métadonnées de référence (Beelen et al., 2025) Tous les fichiers ne sont pas disponibles dans la presse anglaise.

Koeser et al./Princeton, ASU, MPIWG, Harvey , undate fait la date floue, multi-chronologie et raisonnement intersection réutilisable Python pack (Koeser et al., 2025) logiciel lymphe est toujours en évolution; le routage n'élimine pas l'incertitude du matériel historique lui-même

ai-literature.title: IA et littérature
ai-literature.lens: Générer · Collaboration et chaîne de contribution
ai-literature.intro: Un atlas documentaire de IA et littérature, qui conserve le chapitre chinois intégral et cartographie ses preuves, méthodes, débats et cas régionaux.
ai-literature.door: Ouvrez ce volume pour entrer dans le monde documentaire de IA et littérature.
deepDive: Domaines d'application: Générer l'histoire littéraire, les récits computationnels, la collaboration en traduction, les processus d'écriture, l'éducation littéraire, les droits d'auteur et la gouvernance de la plateforme. Principales limitations : La non-répétition des mises à jour du modèle; le manque de transparence dans les programmes de formation; le biais des langues anglaises et des langues de haute ressource; la dérive des concepts d'évaluation; et le changement rapide des politiques. Les constatations doivent être modélisées et datées, de préférence avec des extrants et des conseils comme annexes vérifiables.

Distinction conceptuelle. La recherche en littérature sur l'IA comprend au moins trois objets : les modèles comme outil d'étiquetage, de traduction ou de comparaison; les modèles comme sujets de recherche pour transporter des déviations linguistiques et des orthodoxes culturels de formation; et les modèles comme instrument participatif dans le processus créatif. Combiner les trois en -can la machine écrire -"subscrirait un mécanisme vraiment chercheur. Mécanismes de base. Dans -Les cultures humaines et mécaniques de la respiration : une approche d'assemblage cognitif, Katherine Hayles propose --L'assemblage cognitif : la production de signification est répartie entre les personnes, les interfaces, les algorithmes, les systèmes et l'environnement. Ainsi, la production n'est pas une expression à sujet unique, mais plutôt le résultat du rôle continu des matériels de formation, des structures modèles, des conseils de système, des conseils, des candidats, de l'édition manuelle, de la signature, de la publication et du marketing. L'analyse de l'auteur devrait consigner qui prend la décision expressive à chaque point, pas seulement le -écrit-personne -ou -écrit-AI -écrit -.

Dennis Yi Tenen, The Theory of Robotics: How Computers Learn for Writers: How Computers Lineed to Writer*, explique que l'écriture mécanique -- ne commence pas soudainement avec un modèle en grand langage avant que les modèles, les combinaisons rhétoriques, le formalisme et les calculs précoces soient apportés au modèle de production. (Tenen, 2024) Matthew G. Kirschenbaum, Signature académique officielle, Réviser les traces : une histoire littéraire du traitement de texte*, intègre les formats de documents, les interfaces logicielles, la trajectoire révisée et les fichiers d'auteurs numériques dans l'histoire littéraire, ce qui peut modifier le processus de conservation, visible et attribuable, mais ne peut pas être la base de l'attribution individuelle de modifications de texte à un logiciel particulier.
coreIdeas: L ' identité de l ' auteur est passée de la dualité à un spectre de contribution : pure humaine, pure machine, mélangée uniquement avec une étiquette rugueuse; et plus important encore, qui contrôle la conception, l ' indice, la sélection, la traduction, la réécriture, le tri et la publication. La United States Copyright Agency considère que l'utilisation accessoire de l'IA en vertu de la législation américaine actuelle n'empêche pas les parties originales de l'humanité d'être protégées, mais que le matériel ou le matériel d'IA pur sous lequel les humains n'ont pas un contrôle suffisant sur l'élément d'expression n'est pas protégé; la simple fourniture de conseils est généralement insuffisante (U.S. Copyright Office, 2025). C'est une preuve de la politique des États-Unis et il ne faut pas extrapoler cette politique à une loi mondialement uniforme.

La création de capacités et de compréhensions narratives ne peut être confondue : Tian, par exemple, utilise des récits, des points de retournement, des éveils et des comparaisons de l'argent-valeur des histoires humaines, et constate que les récits de LLM dans les tests sont plus homogènes dans la direction, le suspense et la diversité structurelle; et la fonctionnalité d'intégration visible peut améliorer de façon significative les indicateurs (Tian et coll., 2024). Cela indique que le récit de niveau intermédiaire est valide et ne prouve pas que la machine a l'expérience humaine.

L'écart automatique du cycle d'évaluation : Chhun et d'autres ont trouvé dans 1 056 histoires et de multiples conseils que les cotes LLM sont meilleures que les anciens indicateurs automatiques au niveau du système, mais qu'ils sont difficiles à fournir une interprétation suffisante et cohérente; les modèles peuvent également préférer un texte plus proche de la distribution pré-entraînement (Chhun et autres, 2024). Par conséquent, les modèles homologues ne peuvent pas être utilisés à eux seuls pour générer et marquer.

La collaboration n ' est pas automatique : Teleki et d ' autres font la distinction entre deux paradigmes de < < génération indépendante > > et < < auteur-assistant > > (Teleki et autres, 2025). Les 41 critiques aveugles du concours UCB 2024 montrent que quatre œuvres d'IA pure sont au milieu et que les gagnants travaillent ensemble ; une certaine collaboration prend plus de temps (Park, 2026). Il s'agit d'un cas exploratoire et ne peut être déclaré comme une supériorité générale pour l'écriture mixte.
method: Geler le nom du modèle, la version, le fournisseur, la date, la température, Top-p, le programme système, le contexte et le torrent aléatoire; enregistrer tous les logs d'édition de l'output-manuel.

Les études narratives ajoutent des étiquettes de niveau intermédiaire : événement, cause, effet, virage, focus, cible, suspense, trajectoire émotionnelle; et quel niveau d'amélioration est le résultat de la validation du profilage (Tian et coll., 2024).

La conservation des versions de recherche créative diffère des recommandations de l'IA, de l'adoption de l'auteur, du refus de réécrire, des rapports de travail cognitif et de pouvoir des auteurs d'entrevues.
L'incertitude ouverte, les limites éthiques et la voie du rétablissement.
cases: LLM peut reconnaître les courts clips ? Hicke & Mimno (Hicke et coll., 2025) , modèles spécifiques, textures, tâches au-dessus des lignes de base aléatoires/traditionnelles; des modèles utiles comme les lignes de mots et les prothèses comprennent les styles comme humains; le résultat est multilinguistique

Les histoires de LLM diffèrent des histoires humaines dans Tian et al. (2024) , la structure, les différences de valeurs dans le texte de test; les contraintes linguistiques améliorent la , la , les histoires humaines pour toujours; les indicateurs automatiques sont équivalents aux valeurs esthétiques

LLM pourrait être utile pour remplacer le Comité des humains , 2024 , classement système ; l'explication est encore pauvre, et la vérification humaine du , peut éliminer l'évaluation humaine ou modèle des valeurs littéraires

Le succès de la collaboration humaine dans la production des œuvres mixtes dans le parc (Park, 2026) ne résulte pas nécessairement des 41 écrits d'étudiants qui représentent l'écriture professionnelle ou toutes les langues.
